_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the loop-thrash variant (branch 3) of the excel-activities/write-cell-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException 'wrong format, or Excel is busy' — same wording as branch 2) → jobs logs (~247 successful Write Cell iterations preceding the failure — the smoking gun for branch 3) → workflow source (Write Cell nested inside For Each Row). The combination of partial-success pattern in logs + For Each Row pattern in source distinguishes branch 3 from branch 2 which shares the same error wording.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0022222-2222-3333-4444-555566667777 --state Faulted --output json
